overview: A fully SEO-optimized website for Dr. Ritesh Homoeopathic Clinic in Daltonganj, Jharkhand. Features multi-section navigation, service modals, appointment booking via WhatsApp, patient testimonials, blog articles, and local SEO structured data to help the clinic rank for 'best homeopathy doctor in Daltonganj'.
features: Fixed nav with mobile hamburger and active state tracking
Hero section with doctor card, stats, and CTAs
About Doctor section with credentials and biography
About Clinic with Google Maps embed and feature cards
8 specialized treatment service cards with detail modals
Why Choose Us section with 8 differentiators
Blog section with 3 SEO-targeted inline articles
Contact section with address, hours, and CTA buttons
Floating Call and WhatsApp action buttons
LocalBusiness structured data for local SEO
Fully responsive design across all screen sizes
